summary: Iteration 8 AI Knowledge Base — full backend + frontend validation. 22/22 pytest tests pass covering read-only cache, unknown-node 404, missing_key 400, happy-path Gemini generation via emergentintegrations universal key, cache-hit idempotency (generated_at unchanged), regenerate updates timestamp, related/prereq id resolution, second-node (Kadane) proves node-agnostic prompt, and full regression on roadmap CRUD endpoints. Frontend smoke: /app/knowledge-base/nodes/hld.foundations.cap renders ai-content with all 9 tabs, articles shows 'stub' label, theory renders immediately from global cache, flashcards tap-to-reveal works. Missing-key path on fresh user shows ai-content-error + ai-content-open-settings link.
critical_code_review_comments: knowledge_generation.py docstring says 'Pull from user_settings' but code correctly reads db.settings — cosmetic docstring drift only.
ai_service._classify buckets 'permission denied/403' as invalid_key (401). Fine but semantically 403 would be more accurate; harmless.
test_credentials: Fresh users created inline per test run. Emergent universal Gemini key sk-emergent-aEa152aE36c979b48F patched into ai_config.api_key for happy path.
seed_data_creation: Global knowledge_content cache rows for hld.foundations.cap and dsa.foundations.arrays.kadane are now populated (intentional — shared cache).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration8_ai_kb.py runs under `-n 0` (serial) because it hits real Gemini and depends on shared cache. Register uses field 'name' (not full_name). Onboarding schema requires current_position, daily_study_hours, self_assessment, interview_target_date. Iteration 8 knowledge-base endpoints are fully wired and stable.
